channel.title: The Latency Report
channel.description: The Latency Report is a daily AI-generated podcast covering the latest in artificial intelligence, software engineering, data science, and tech startups. Every episode is researched, written, and produced autonomously — delivering sharp, concise insights on what's moving in the world of technology. No fluff, just signal.
channel.itunes:author: Jade Kelman

item.title: July 06, 2026 — Investigating the Intersection of Causal Machine L
item.itunes:author: Jade Kelman
item.description: In this podcast, Jade and Kristi will talk about Investigating the Intersection of Causal Machine Learning and Graph Neural Networks for Predicting Real-World Outcomes in 2026 Climate Modeling Applications.

item.title: Homomorphic Encryption
item.description: In this episode, we delve into the potential of homomorphic encryption in secure multi-party computation for 2025 fintech applications. Listeners will learn how this cutting-edge technology enables secure data sharing and collaboration without compromising sensitive information. Our experts will discuss the current state of homomorphic encryption, its applications in fintech, and the benefits it can bring to the industry, including enhanced security, improved compliance, and increased efficiency. Tune in to discover the possibilities and challenges of implementing homomorphic encryption in real-world fintech scenarios and what to expect from this technology in the near future.

item.title: AI Transparency in Healthcare
item.description: In this episode, we delve into the role of multimodal transformers in enhancing explainability and transparency of AI-driven decision making systems in 2025 healthcare applications.

item.title: Edge AI Security
item.description: The increasing use of Edge AI devices in IoT networks has introduced new security risks. In this episode, we explore the rise of adversarial machine learning attacks on these devices and discuss mitigation strategies for 2026.
